summary: Plan-only live PR inventory classification. The artifact indicates this is not a dedupe cluster and no shared canonical should be invented, so each open PR is classified independently with no GitHub mutations planned.

actions.reason: Distinct documentation PR with passing relevant checks; no hydrated evidence supports duplicate, superseded, low-signal closeout, route_security, merge, or fix action.
Focused skills CLI PR, but failing checks block any merge or fixed-by-candidate closeout. No close-style action is justified in this inventory shard.
Independent skills lint feature PR with author-followup and failed checks. It should stay open for author or maintainer follow-up; no low-signal or superseded closeout is supported.
Focused UI bug-fix PR with passing checks and no duplicate/superseded evidence; keep it independent for maintainer review rather than close or merge in this plan-only shard.
Independent plugin SDK compatibility PR with passing checks; no hydrated evidence supports duplicate, superseded, low-signal closeout, route_security, merge, or fix action.
